title: ricinus communis var. undulatus
intro: Ricinus communis var. undulatus, also known as the undulate castor oil plant, is a variant of the Ricinus communis plant characterized by its wavy or undulating leaves. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which contain ricinoleic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ricinus communis var. undulatus include soothing skin irritations, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include oil extracted from its seeds, which can be used topically or taken internally in small amounts, as well as tinctures and infusions made from the leaves.
